TypeSignature.Value: .class public sequential ansi sealed beforefieldinit SKFontArguments extends System.ValueType

Docs.summary: Specifies arguments for customizing a typeface, including variation position, palette selection, and palette color overrides.
Gets or sets the zero-based index of the typeface to select within a font collection (TTC) file.
Docs.value: The zero-based font index within a TTC file, or 0 for a single-typeface font file.

Docs.summary: Gets or sets the zero-based index of the color palette to select from the font's CPAL table.
Docs.value: The zero-based index of the palette to use for color glyphs.

Docs.summary: Gets or sets the per-entry color overrides to apply on top of the selected palette.
Docs.value: A span of values, each specifying a palette slot index and replacement color.

Docs.summary: Gets or sets the variation axis coordinates that define the design position of the cloned typeface.
Docs.value: A span of values, each pairing an axis tag with its desired value.
